name: Williams-Sonoma, Inc.
description: Williams-Sonoma, Inc. is a prominent American multi-channel specialty retailer of high-quality home furnishings and kitchenware. Founded in 1956 by Chuck Williams, the company has grown into a diverse portfolio of iconic brands, including Williams Sonoma, Pottery Barn, West Elm, Rejuvenation, and Mark and Graham. Headquartered in San Francisco, California, the company operates globally, offering a wide range of products designed to help customers create comfortable and stylish homes. Williams-Sonoma, Inc. is committed to sustainability and design excellence, maintaining a strong presence through both its extensive e-commerce platforms and physical retail store locations.
